title: Add Wave 23 manager property detail timeline regression matrix
description: Expand QA coverage for manager property detail timeline payload and UI consumption while preserving Wave 20-22 auth, assignment-context, and filter baselines.
acceptance_criteria: Regression matrix includes timeline payload contract checks and ordering guarantees
API tests assert deterministic timeline metadata plus unauthorized/forbidden envelopes
Wave 20-22 manager baselines remain stable after Wave 23 coverage is added
